shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n---FILES---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'! .git'"' | head -120 && printf '\\n---STATUS---\\n' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"Next.js Server Action toggle notification preference revalidatePath refresh current page\" --json --top-k 5 && printf '\\n---PACKAGE---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' package.json && printf '\\n---PAGE---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n---LAYOUT---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n---CONFIG---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' next.config.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals && npm exec tsc -- --noEmit && git diff -- app/actions.ts app/page.tsx tsconfig.json 2>/dev/null || true'
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba app/actions.ts && printf '\\n---\\n' && nl -ba app/page.tsx && printf '\\n---STATUS FILES---\\n' && find app -maxdepth 1 -type f -print | sort"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
